title: Everdeep Kind Registry
description: Declares entity kinds. Depth is unbounded because kinds declare childKinds (ARCHITECTURE.md §3.2). This format is a public contract: v2.5 lets users author their own kinds against it (Q9).

reveal.description: day-one: visible from first login (Q8: six kinds). on-demand: appears once used by generation or explicitly enabled. reference: read-only library entities (e.g. creatures).

label.description: Prompt-style — it should teach worldbuilding ("What protects this place?")

options.description: For enum fields: the fixed dropdown choices (e.g. a person's disposition toward the party). A blank "—" option is added by the editor.

secret.description: GM-only field: shown in the editor with a 🔒, never rendered in Player View (e.g. GM notes, a person's true feelings toward the party).

refKind.description: For entityRef fields: which kind(s) the reference may point at. A list where more than one fits — a faction's seat is a settlement OR a place, and naming only one made the other unpickable.

generators.description: Generators that can (re)generate an entity of this kind in place.

childSuggestions.description: What the universal "+ Add" offers, and what ghost slots this kind presents (slot order here IS the frozen slot order — CONTRACTS.md §6).

ghostCount.description: Default ghost slots shown (Q13: 3-5 total per page)
